headline: Genuine Parts Split Into Two Pure Plays Puts Margins And Dividends Under Focus
summary: Genuine Parts (NYSE:GPC) plans to separate into two independent companies, Global Automotive and Global Industrial. The split is intended to create more focused businesses and attract investors aligned with each segment. The reorganization follows input from activist investors seeking to surface potential value for shareholders. Genuine Parts, best known for its NAPA auto parts business, operates across both automotive replacement parts and industrial products distribution. By moving toward...
